title: Unpin primary column, or allow it to be moved
excerpt: The primary column is pinned to the left of each table by default, and I’d like the ability to move other columns to its left, or to unpin the primary column and move it anywhere. The primary column can take up a lot of …

posts.author: ebeers (Elizabeth B)
posts.cookedHtml: The primary column is pinned to the left of each table by default, and I’d like the ability to move other columns to its left, or to unpin the primary column and move it anywhere. The primary column can take up a lot of space on the page, and I often have to resize it or scroll horizontally to see the other columns, which are usually thin color-coded status columns. So, if I could move those columns to the left of the primary one, then I would be able to see those statuses immediately at a glance.
